
### paths for memory errors  {.smaller}


```
void foo(int a, int b) {
  char buffer[10];
  if (a <= 10) {
    // added bounds-checking:
    assert(inBounds(buffer+a+b));
    buffer[a + b] = b;
  }
}

```
 ![](/symbolic/texfig/symbolic-exec-memory-errors.figure.svg){.absolute top="0%" left="0%" width=1050 height=600 .my-center }
 

* add bounds checking assertions --- try to solve to satisfy
